objective: Record direct flat eight-cluster GQA8 RTL/perf equivalence with intermediate score hashes, shared value requests, ordered outputs, and completion cycles.

decoder_contract.decode_score_multivalue_gqa_group_equiva: Directly simulate the generated flat eight-cluster Llama7B GQA8 RTL for eight distinct 128-element query heads over identical key/value tensors. Compare every intermediate score write/read and all 128 ordered result beats against the perf/reference model, and retain the separate wrapper sharing/order protocol test as a backpressure cross-check.

evaluation_record.title: GQA8 shared-K/V multivalue decode group for the Llama7B frontier
evaluation_record.primary_question: How do area, timing, and KV service demand change when one complete Llama7B GQA8 group is embodied instead of pricing eight query heads as independent value consumers?
evaluation_record.expected_reason: Integrated eight-cluster score tensors, shared value requests, and ordered result beats must match the perf/reference model.
